profile.name: Rakshit Agarwal
profile.title: Full Stack Software Engineer
profile.heroBio: MERN-stack engineer with 3+ years building high-traffic products in fintech, healthcare, and events. I've shipped platforms serving 10,000+ users, processing 1,000+ payments, and handling 500+ concurrent sessions — with measurable wins like 60% faster deploys, 40% less manual processing, and sub-200ms real-time bidding.
aboutBio: B.Tech in Computer Science (ABES Engineering College, 2019). I've progressed from real-time auction systems at Globalvox to fintech architecture at Brainerhub — owning the full stack across React, Next.js, Node.js, Angular, and databases from MongoDB to PostgreSQL.

I don't just write features: I've led frontend for healthcare and event products, integrated Stripe and Razorpay payment flows, built CI/CD pipelines that eliminated manual releases, and set PR standards that cut defects by 30% on a 4-engineer team. Strong in system design, API integration, and shipping under production pressure. I also run a technical YouTube channel — I believe great engineers communicate as clearly as they code.

highlights: Architected end-to-end fintech platform for financial advisors across 3+ client tiers — reduced manual transaction processing by 40%
Integrated Stripe payments and DocuSign-style e-signatures, cutting document turnaround from days to under 2 hours
Launched Next.js full-stack app with automated CI/CD — 60% faster deployments and zero manual release errors
Unified API and database layers into a single Next.js codebase, reducing new-hire onboarding time by 30%
Led frontend for event listing platform and admin portal managing 5+ concurrent event workflows
Delivered payment processing, analytics dashboards, and ticketing for Booklit — 1,000+ transactions processed in production
Built barcode-based ticket validation, reducing event check-in time by 50% and eliminating entry queue bottlenecks
Improved SSR event booking site performance by 35% through Next.js and React optimization
Led frontend architecture for Bering Health patient portal — 10,000+ active users on React and Next.js
Built multi-step onboarding with embedded video consultations — 25% lower drop-off and improved admin visibility
Engineered Redux Toolkit integration layer with custom hooks, reducing state-management bugs by 40%
Established PR review standards for a 4-engineer team, cutting post-release defects by 30%
Shipped full-stack features for Bigdeal auction platform and Bridge Invest financial portal — 500+ concurrent users
Designed real-time auction engine with member-exclusive workflows and sub-200ms bid response times
Built Node.js backend with Redis caching and Socket.io, powering live bid updates across 100+ simultaneous auction rooms

projects.title: Sales Dashboard
projects.description: End-to-end MERN admin dashboard for e-commerce — live sales KPIs, customer management, order tracking, and interactive charts in one place. Replaces scattered spreadsheets and gives operators instant visibility into revenue and customer behavior.
